name: Quick Chicken Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into thin strips
2 tablespoons Argo or Kingsford's Corn Starch
1/2 teaspoon minced fresh ginger root or ground ginger
1 red bell pepper and 1 onion, sliced
1/4 pound sliced mushrooms and snow peas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine chicken, 1 tablespoon each soy sauce and corn starch, garlic, and ginger. Let stand for 15 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, combine 3 tablespoons soy sauce, 1 tablespoon corn starch, and 3/4 cup water in a separate bowl. Set aside.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a stir fry pan or hot skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken and stir-fry for 3 minutes; remove from the pan and set aside.
4. Heat remaining 1 tablespoon oil in the same pan. Add vegetables (red bell pepper, onion, mushrooms, and snow peas) and stir-fry for 5 minutes. Stir in the chicken and soy sauce mixture, stirring constantly. Bring to a boil for 1 minute. Serve over rice.
